quality_gates: Run targeted tests for the changed package or app.
Run pnpm -s typecheck before completing stories that touch TypeScript source.
Run pnpm -s check before completing stories that touch shared runtime, config, daemon routing, or release-facing behavior.
For side-panel UI stories, run pnpm -C apps/chrome-extension build and the supported browser/extension test path from AGENTS.md when feasible.
title: Add Local-Only Privacy Guard
